title: Fang of Ronas
description: The mod adds Ronas's fang with poison effect, Ronas's fang without poison effect, Ronas's blade handle and Ronas's poison and 5 crafts, from LetsPlay by YouTuber Lololoshka
body:
The mod adds Ronas fang with poison effect, Ronas fang without poison effect, Ronas blade handle and Ronas poison and 5 crafts, with LetsPlay by YouTuber Lololoshka this mod will perfectly complement your game because it adds interesting mechanics to the game

Ronas's Fang skill, which has an effect - when hitting the enemy, it imposes the effect of poison on him

Warning.
The potion cannot be drunk, it is created only for crafting
